name: status-bar
author: lumine-code
description: Display information about the current editor such as cursor position, file path, grammar, current branch, ahead/behind commits counts, and line diff count.

status-bar.description: A container for indicators at the bottom of the workspace

isVisible.title: Is Visible
isVisible.description: Show status bar at the bottom of the workspace

fullWidth.title: Full-width
fullWidth.description: Fit the status-bar to the window's full-width

cursorPositionFormat.title: Cursor Position Format
cursorPositionFormat.description: Format for the cursor position status bar element, where %L is the line number and %C is the column number

selectionCountFormat.title: Selection Count Format
selectionCountFormat.description: Format for the selection count status bar element, where %L is the line count and %C is the character count
